steps.title: Read the starting value
steps.content: In an exponential model, the number multiplying the power is the value when the exponent is $0$. Here $t$ measures hours after the initial measurement, so the initial measurement happens at $t=0$.

steps.title: Evaluate the model at the start
steps.content: $$f(0)=28{,}000(2)^0$$$$f(0)=28{,}000(1)=28{,}000$$So $28{,}000$ is the yeast cell count at the initial measurement, not the value after one hour or the doubling time. The answer is A.
